---
title: "ragnarok_muninn.js"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\harness\ragnarok_muninn.js"
loc: 72
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.90
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 4.18
overall_score: 2.83
---

## Intent
The `ragnarok_muninn.js` sector implements modular logic focusing on __filename, __dirname, PROJECT_ROOT, SANDBOX_DIR, UGLY_FILE, escapedProjectRoot, escapedSandboxDir, pyScript, runnerPath, result, healedContent, arbitraryPixels. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via __filename, __dirname, PROJECT_ROOT, SANDBOX_DIR, UGLY_FILE, escapedProjectRoot, escapedSandboxDir, pyScript, runnerPath, result, healedContent, arbitraryPixels. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [spawnSync](file://child_process)
- [*](file://fs)
- [*](file://path)
- [fileURLToPath](file://url)

### Exports
- `__filename`
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `SANDBOX_DIR`
- `UGLY_FILE`
- `escapedProjectRoot`
- `escapedSandboxDir`
- `pyScript`
- `runnerPath`
- `result`
- `healedContent`
- `arbitraryPixels`
